description:
Operating Area: Italy, Sardinia, Sicily

The ICE 60, designed by Umberto Felci in collaboration with the shipyard’s team, is a true fast cruiser, developed for the most competitive owner, who targets both top performances in regatta and at the same time needs comfort and space while cruising.

The high construction technology and the incredible artisan quality which is evolving towards perfection each year thanks to the best of Italian craftsmanship, guarantees the top performances that Ice Yachts deliver with every boat that they launch.

Charters aboard PURA FOLLIA also features a tender with an electric outboard motor; allowing guests to access remote locations and explore destinations which often go unnoticed.

crew.name: Vittorio Ammutinato
crew.bio:
Sail & Work Experience: 
Vittorio has been working in the nautical sector for nearly two decades, working on many different yachts and gaining expertise in a range of activities. As the previous Captain of PURA FOLLIA, Vittorio is returning with complete knowledge of her technical abilities and how to adapt to the desires of guests onboard. While also maintaining proficiency as a skipper, Vittorio has also been technical director of several shipyards. He provides a passionate sailing charter for guests of PURA FOLLIA. 

Job Description: 
Vittorio is responsible for the navigation, safety, overall running, and financial management of the vessel, crew and guests. He ensures the safe and efficient operation of the yacht at all times, including compliance with all safety procedures and regulations. He takes care of adhering to flag regulations, port, state, and local laws and regulations, and manages the crew to ensure adherence to the vessel’s policies. He provides daily leadership for the crew and encourages teamwork, individual growth and personal attention by delegating duties and supervising all crew tasks. 

Licenses & Qualifications: 
- RYA/MCA Yacht Master Offshore Qualification
- Radio Telephone Operator Certificate
- Windsurfing and Sailing Instructor Qualification
- Unlimited Sailing Motor Boat License
- National Lifesaving Society Certificate

Languages: 
Italian and English

crew.name: Amedeo Lapicca
crew.bio:
Sail & Work Experience: 
Lorenzo grew up sailing, gaining experience on his family’s sailboat in maintenance and navigation for over 7 years. He then progressed to sailing yachts in 2021, where he assisted the Captain with general tasks and learnt skills in galley management, cleaning service and food preparation. Working in communication and retail in the off seasons, Lorenzo is keen to get back out on the water and make use of his love for sailing. 

Job Description: 
Lorenzo is responsible for the organisation, management, and cleanliness of all interiors of the yacht. As well as helping with sailing, he ensures the cleaning and preparation of the vessel to the highest standard prior to, and during, any and all guest tips. 

Licenses & Qualifications: 
- Lifeguard Certification
- Basic Life Support and Defibrillation (BLSD)
- Free Diving License
- Rope Access Work Certification
- Supervisor for Rope Access Work

Languages: 
Italian and English
